intro: Cyrtomidictyum lepidocaulon, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various diseases such as arthritis, wounds, and infections.
